summary: PR 2548 deleted the repository-root target_funcs.txt file, which listed eight already-checked grAnime functions in src/melee/gr/granime.c. The only recorded bot report says there were no changes for GALE01 between base 09511e2 and head bcc3bf5.

evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted file mode 100644 for target_funcs.txt

key_files.role: referenced by the removed target list; not changed by this PR slice

evidence_refs: raw_diff: diff --git a/target_funcs.txt b/target_funcs.txt deleted file mode 100644

what_changed.text: Removed a target list containing eight checked grAnime functions: grAnime_801C86D4, grAnime_801C84A4, grAnime_801C8578, grAnime_801C6A54, grAnime_801C752C, grAnime_801C6C0C, grAnime_801C7228, and grAnime_801C7C1C.
The PR body was empty and there were no review comments in the loaded slice.
A decomp-dev bot issue comment reported 'No changes' for GALE01.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot], body '### Report for GALE01 (09511e2 - bcc3bf5)\n\nNo changes'

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR scoped to deleting a stale target-function list rather than mixing it with source changes.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: only changed file is target_funcs.txt

follow_up_queries: PRs deleting target lists after grAnime work

text_corpus.jsonl: empty PR body and bot report
notes: Evidence is strong for the file deletion and exact removed target list.
Evidence is weak for any reusable decomp technique because the PR contains no source edits, review comments, or authored explanation beyond the title.
The bot report supports that its reported comparison had 'No changes', but this intake does not independently validate builds, objdiff, or regression status.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the listed grAnime functions were newly matched in this PR; the diff only shows removal of a checked target list.
Do not derive naming, control-flow, typing, or matching tactics from this PR because it contains no function-body changes.
Do not promote the bot 'No changes' line into independent validation beyond the loaded comment.
